questions.text: What is the primary purpose of a Cost Center in business management?
options: To collect and analyze costs of any business units

questions.text: How does the Cost Center Hierarchy function in relation to L'Oréal P&L?
options: It aligns with the Compass Group Cost Center

questions.text: What is the purpose of a Profit Center?
options: To collect information on employee performance
To segregate financial data by management Units

questions.text: What does WBS allow in terms of budget management?
options: Budget follow up and control at any level of the hierarchy

questions.text: Which statement correctly describes the Valuation class in Material Management?
options: It prevents automatic G/L account assignment
Determines G/L account assignment based on the nature of the product and plant type
Is only relevant to the procurement process

questions.text: The Global Customer Hierarchy Framework includes one "Sold To" level.
Budget availability control does not support an approval workflow process for indirect procurement.
In the context of budget availability for a cost center or WBS, a purchase requisition may exceed the available budget.
According to the new "Account based" principle in NEO, each line of the P&L is represented by an account.
Under the new S4 processes, direct posting and use of cost collectors like WBS and Cost Centers are mutually exclusive.
